# Magnolia Crestview

> Magnolia Crestview is an apartment community at 2701 W Manor Pl, Seattle, WA 98199, in Seattle's Magnolia neighborhood — a short walk from Discovery Park. It offers one-bedroom and two-bedroom/two-bath apartments for rent, professionally managed by AGM Real Estate Group, LLC.

## Key facts
- Property name: Magnolia Crestview
- Address: 2701 W Manor Pl, Seattle, WA 98199
- Neighborhood: Magnolia, Seattle, Washington
- Phone: (206) 694-1714
- Email: pwedeberg@agmrealestategroup.com
- Managed by: AGM Real Estate Group, LLC
- Floor plans: 1 bedroom (~600 sq ft) from $1,595/month; 2 bedroom / 2 bath (~1,000 sq ft) up to ~$1,995/month
- Current special: One month free on a 12-month lease
- Notable features: private decks, updated kitchens, covered and uncovered on-site parking, pet-friendly
- Location highlights: steps from Discovery Park (534 acres); near Magnolia Village shops, cafés, and farmers market; ~15 minutes to downtown Seattle

## Contact
- To schedule a tour or apply, call (206) 694-1714 or use the tour scheduler at https://magnolia-apartments-agm.pages.dev/#tour
